tier_0_free.label: Free Tier (current default)
tier_0_free.suitable_for: solo dev, prototyping, demo, early beta
tier_0_free.risk: Rate limits hit under load. No SLA. Model availability varies.
tier_0_free.source: ESTIMATE: OpenRouter free tier observed limits

tier_1_startup.label: Startup Tier (first paying customers)
tier_1_startup.risk: Cost spikes on long QA loops. Need hard budget caps.

tier_2_growth.label: Growth Tier (scaling)
tier_2_growth.risk: Tight margin if price-to-cost ratio not calibrated.

tier_3_enterprise.label: Enterprise Tier
tier_3_enterprise.risk: Requires significant capital before revenue at this scale.

phase_0_pre_launch.label: Pre-Launch (now → 3 months)
phase_0_pre_launch.key_milestone: Working UOM mesh stable, omni-saas Layer 3 hooks complete

phase_1_early_beta.label: Early Beta (3-6 months)
revenue_sources: Ko-fi / Buy Me a Coffee one-time (₹200-500/transaction)
phase_1_early_beta.key_milestone: First public demo. First sponsor. README + docs polished.

phase_2_first_customers.label: First Paying Customers (6-12 months)
revenue_sources: Managed UOM setup service: ₹2000-5000 one-time per customer
phase_2_first_customers.key_milestone: omni-saas S0+S1 working. First customer paying for swarm output.
phase_2_first_customers.source: ESTIMATE: comparable solo SaaS on IndieHackers at 12 months median

phase_3_growth.label: Growth Phase (12-24 months)
revenue_sources: API reseller margin on model calls: ₹2000-10000/month
phase_3_growth.key_milestone: Full omni-saas S0-S4 pipeline. Product-market fit signal.
phase_3_growth.source: ESTIMATE: top 15th percentile solo SaaS at 18 months

phase_4_scale.label: Scale Phase (24-36 months)
revenue_sources: White-label UOM mesh for other solo devs / micro-agencies
Swarm output as a service (research packs, build packs)
Revenue share on Stripe products built by swarms
phase_4_scale.key_milestone: Requires hire, or strong automation reducing manual ops to <4hr/week.
phase_4_scale.source: ESTIMATE: top 5th percentile solo SaaS 30 months

scenario_conservative.label: Conservative (most likely)
scenario_conservative.note: Only achievable if first 5 paying customers reached at month 6

scenario_realistic.label: Realistic (median path)
scenario_realistic.note: Requires consistent shipping + content presence (Shadow Narratives cross-promo helps)

scenario_optimistic.label: Optimistic (top 10% scenario)
scenario_optimistic.note: Requires enterprise contract or viral product launch

roi_summary.warning: Solo non-developer SaaS median MRR at 12 months is under $500/month globally. INR pricing gives competitive edge in Indian market. Singapore re-entry may unlock higher-ticket consulting contracts.
